'''"Scorch" Zanales''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Daimlo]] from [[Daimla]], was a successful [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]].

Zanales spoke [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] and was considered the favorite of the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]], as he performed well on [[The Citadel (episode)|The Citadel]] course located on [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]].

During the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] of [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], and among several other contestants of an illegal [[Great Dordon Caves|Caves]] race on the planet [[Euceron]] (including [[Ody Mandrell/Legends|Ody Mandrell]], [[Aldar Beedo/Legends|Aldar Beedo]], [[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]], [[Kam Nale|Elan Mak]], [[Will Neluenf]], and 14-year-old [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]), Zanales, who had been closely tailing Skywalker, unfortunately got tangled up with [[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]], and the two racers crashed their pods.

Skywalker won the race on behalf of the children of [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]]—[[Deland Tyerell/Legends|Deland]] and [[Doby Tyerell|Doby]], whose podracer Anakin piloted to free their sister-slave [[Djulla Tyerell|Djulla]] from the clutches of her master, [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] (whose son, [[Hekula]], took second place).<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games">''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]''</ref>
